ddls:
CREATE TABLE "error_types" (
  "error_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error type */,
  "error_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the error type (e.g., business, technical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the error type (e.g., payment, account) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_codes" (
  "error_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error code */,
  "error_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error type the code belongs to */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code (e.g., beneficiary_bank_unreachable, insufficient_balance) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message associated with the error code */,
  "reason_for_error" TEXT /* Reason for the error */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to resolve the error */,
  "error_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_codes_error_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_type_id") REFERENCES error_types ("error_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_instances" (
  "error_instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error instance */,
  "error_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error code the instance belongs to */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that encountered the error */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date the error occurred */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the error resolution (e.g., pending, resolved, escalation_required) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the error was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_instances_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_instances_error_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_code_id") REFERENCES error_codes ("error_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_instances_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., credit, debit) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer support, operations) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., IT, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "error_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error instance the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_comments_error_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_instance_id") REFERENCES error_instances ("error_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "error_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error instance the history belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., updated resolution status) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_history_error_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_instance_id") REFERENCES error_instances ("error_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "error_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error instance the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., error summary, error details) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_reports_error_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_instance_id") REFERENCES error_instances ("error_instance_id")
)
